args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up default routing via SmartRouter combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
- Simple note: Default router is SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks. Constructor initializes router with optional override.

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Base class implementing core Hono functionality including router interface, handler registration, request dispatch, and error/not-found handling.
- Names noticed: HonoBase, Hono, HonoOptions, Router, Context, compose, Context, ExecutionCtx, Env, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, getPath, mergePath, RouterRoute, COMPOSED_HANDLER.
- Simple note: Implements HTTP methods, basePath, route, mount, onError, notFound. #dispatch uses router.match to find handlers, then composes middleware.

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: PatternRouter factory module exporting the PatternRouter class.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
- Simple note: Thin export wrapper, delegates to router.ts implementation.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: PatternRouter implements router interface using regex patterns for routes with optional trailing slash and wildcard parameter handling.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, Route<T>, emptyParams.
- Simple note: Adds routes as compiled regex patterns. match() iterates all routes and returns matching handlers with captured params. Supports :param and /* wildcards.

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: LinearRouter factory module exporting the LinearRouter class.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
- Simple note: Thin export wrapper, delegates to router.ts implementation.

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: LinearRouter implements linear search through routes array handling star wildcards, named params with regex, and optional parameters.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams, ROUTES_LOOP.
- Simple note: Stores routes as [method, path, handler] arrays. match() loops through all routes checking exact matches, star wildcards, and named params via string parsing and regex.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: RegExpRouter factory module exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter with buildInitParams/serializeInitParams for pre-built router export.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT.
- Simple note: Supports hot-reload via PreparedRegExpRouter which takes pre-built matchers. Original RegExpRouter builds matcher on first match call.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: RegExpRouter builds trie-based matcher for routes using separate middleware and route storage, compiles to regex on first match.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, buildWildcardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, match, emptyParam, findMiddleware, Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerWithMetadata, PATH_ERROR.
- Simple note: Stores routes in #routes hash, middleware in #middleware. Adds routes then calls buildAllMatchers() to compile trie into regex pattern. match() uses precompiled matcher.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Defines matcher interface and provides match function for RegExpRouter which uses precompiled regex to find handlers and param mapping.
- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, match, emptyParam.
- Simple note: match function builds matchers on first call, caches them. Uses static match from hash or dynamic regex match. Returns handlers with param index map for lookup.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter implements router that accepts pre-built matchers and relocateMap for hot-reload capable router instances.
- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, Router, MatcherMap, RelocateMap, handlerData, staticMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
- Simple note: Takes matchers in constructor, can handle routes added after build. add() updates pre-existing handler slots. Useful for edge runtime with serialized router state.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Node class implements trie structure for RegExpRouter using regex string tokens and varIndex mapping for named params.
- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, compareKey.
- Simple note: #children stores regex tokens as keys, #index marks route end, #varIndex tracks named param positions. insert() builds trie, buildRegExpStr() constructs regex with capture markers.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Trie class processes route paths into tokens and delegates to Node for trie construction, then builds final regex with index mappings.
- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ParamAssocArray, ParamIndexMap, ReplacementMap.
- Simple note: #root is trie Node. insert() extracts pattern groups and splits path into tokens. buildRegExp() transforms trie into regex with # and @ markers for handler and param index replacement.

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: SmartRouter factory module exporting the SmartRouter class.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
- Simple note: Thin export wrapper, delegates to router.ts implementation.

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: SmartRouter chains multiple routers, tries each sequentially until one matches, then adopts that router and caches it.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, routers, routes, activeRouter.
- Simple note: Maintains #routers array and #routes pending routes. match() adds routes to all routers, tries each, returns first match. Catches UnsupportedPathError and continues. Activates successful router.

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: TrieRouter factory module exporting the TrieRouter class.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
- Simple note: Thin export wrapper, delegates to router.ts implementation.

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: TrieRouter implements trie-based routing using Node class, handling optional parameters and wildcard matching.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, Node, checkOptionalParameter, Params, Result.
- Simple note: #node is trie Node. add() splits path with checkOptionalParameter, #node.insert() stores method/path/handler. #node.search() traverses trie and returns all matching handlers.

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Node class implements trie for TrieRouter using method-based structure with patterns and children for named param and wildcard matching.
- Names noticed: Node, Pattern, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, splitRoutingPath, getPattern, splitPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, hasChildren.
- Simple note: #children is trie for path segments, #methods stores handlers per method, #patterns stores regex patterns. search() does breadth-first search, matches patterns at each level, collects all matching handlers sorted by registration order.

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Shared test utilities for all router implementations including parameter extraction, handler matching, and skip configuration for unsupported features.
- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, runTest, skip, router, match, ParamIndexMap, Params, task, suite, skipTask.
- Simple note: runTest() wraps common test suites. Extracts params from match result, handles stash-based param mapping. Tests basic usage, reserved words, wildcards, optional params, regex patterns, multi-match scenarios.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests PatternRouter including inheritance of common cases and pattern-specific behavior around trailing slashes and duplicate param names.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip.
- Simple note: Skips tests for duplicate param names and trailing slash handling. Tests trailing slash returns parent route. Runs common test suite with skip config.

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests LinearRouter including common cases and linear-specific limitations around combined label+star patterns and trailing slashes.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip.
- Simple note: Skips tests for label+star combination, trailing slash. Tests optional param extraction. Runs common test suite with skip config.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests RegExpRouter including common cases and reg-exp-specific constraints on ambiguous routes and duplicate param names.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip, ParamStash, Match.
- Simple note: Skips tests for ambiguous routes, duplicate params, complex capturing groups. Tests return value type with stash. Runs common test suite with skip config.

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combined, verifying fallback behavior.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest.
- Simple note: Uses RegExpRouter then TrieRouter fallback. Runs common test suite without skips.

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests TrieRouter implementation against common case test suite with no skips.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest.
- Simple note: Runs full common test suite. Uses trie-based matching with breadth-first search and handler collection.

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests Node class in isolation, covering root behavior, wildcard handling, named params, regex patterns, multi-match, sort order, and duplicate param scenarios.
- Names noticed: Node, insert, search, Params, ParamIndexMap.
- Simple note: Tests root node creation, wildcard matching, named param extraction, regex pattern matching, multi-handler return, sort order by registration, duplicate param handling, fallback routes.

## Cross-File Checklist

- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts. Uses regex compilation per add, no trie, allows duplicate param names.
- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts. Linear array search, no trie, rejects label+star combination, handles trailing slash for static routes.
- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts. Build matcher on first call, supports hot-reload via PreparedRegExpRouter, rejects ambiguous routes, uses trie with regex string tokens.
- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts. Chains routers sequentially, activates first successful one, delegates UnsupportedPathError. Default in Hono.
- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts. Pure trie with breadth-first search, collects all matching handlers sorted by score, supports both named params and wildcards.
